subject: Equity Law
module: Express Trusts: Trustee Duties and Powers

lessons.title: Trustees Duties Duties of Investment and the Prudent Trustee Standard
lessons.description: Trustees have extensive duties when managing trust property.

lessons.title: Trustees Duties Duty not to Profit and the Rule against Self-Dealing
lessons.description: These are grounded in equity's fierce protection of the fiduciary relationship — the relationship of trust and confidence that a trustee holds with the beneficiaries.

lessons.title: Trustees Powers Delegation Advancement and Maintenance
lessons.description: The general rule at common law was that a trustee could not delegate their duties. Trustees are appointed personally for their judgment and skill — delegatus non potest delegare — a delegate cannot delegate.
